case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MELISSA REITZLOFF et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA ROBINSON, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA ROBINSON, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 415.45 (COPY IN D.206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED DEC-05-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, JAMES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA ROBINSON, JAMES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA ROBINSON, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 116 CAMERON WAY SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDING ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA ROBINSON, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED DEC-05-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT REITZLOFF, MELISSA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED DEC-05-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $9.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
